utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 items appear in the final package. We'll count as included. 4) accommodation: specified hotel name, city, total cost, nights and dates — OK. 5) activities: listed with individual costs and total — OK. 6) additional_services: lists restaurant reservations availability and pre-registration; no costs provided; format requires 'any extra services with costs.'
